prompt: Professional minimalist flat design icon of certified quality and trust. Badge or seal with a checkmark inside, representing certification and quality assurance. Geometric clean lines, pure flat solid colors in orange (#d74f1d) and white. Isolated on completely transparent background. 512x512. High fidelity vector icon. No shadows, no 3D. Flat design only, certification symbol.
negative_prompt: realistic photograph, 3D render, photorealistic, blurry, low quality, cartoon, hand-drawn, painted, watercolor, textured, gradients, shadows, depth effects, complex details
